case_title: RONALD L SPONSEL VS. ROBERT FYLES

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF RONALD SPONSEL'S MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF IS PERMITTED TO NAME SAM FYLES PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 474 IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION THAT HE WAS IGNORANT OF THE NEW DEFENDANT'S NAME OR IDENTITY AT THE TIME HE FILED THE COMPLAINT. MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF RONALD SPONSEL'S Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Complaint IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF IS PERMITTED TO NAME SAM FYLES PURSUANT TO C C P SECTION 474 IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION THAT HE WAS IGNORANT OF THE NEW DEFENDANT'S NAME OR IDENTITY AT THE TIME HE FILED THE COMPLAINT.
